query: I am looking for black-orchid by tom-ford.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a similar accord profile to the original Black Orchid by Tom Ford, with warm spicy, earthy, and woody notes.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid Parfum
recommendations.reason: This parfum version of Black Orchid has a strong focus on patchouli and yellow floral notes, which are also present in the original fragrance.

recommendations.name: Black Orchid Hair Mist
recommendations.reason: As it's already from the same brand and has similar accords to the original Black Orchid, this hair mist could be a good option for those who want a lighter version of the fragrance.

query: Can you recommend the fragrance named j-adore by dior?

recommendations.name: Synthetic-Nature
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a similar fresh and floral profile to J'Adore by Dior, with notes of lily of the valley and jasmine.

recommendations.name: Amberbomb
recommendations.reason: This fragrance shares some similarities with J'Adore in its warm and spicy accords, particularly the use of amber and vanilla.

recommendations.name: Snow-Palace
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a similar ozonic and marine profile to J'Adore, with notes of aquatic and aldehydic accords that might appeal to fans of the original.

query: I want a citrus and woody fragrance from Dior.

recommendations.name: Maze Eau De Parfum
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines citrus and woody notes, with a warm spicy accord that aligns well with your preferences.

recommendations.name: James Bond 007 Ocean Royale
recommendations.reason: As a citrus and woody fragrance, James Bond 007 Ocean Royale is a great match for you. The marine notes add a unique twist to the scent.

recommendations.name: Musk
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines woody, citrus, and musky notes, which aligns well with your preferences. The powdery accord adds depth to the scent.

query: Recommend a warm spicy vanilla perfume by Tom Ford.

recommendations.name: Allende
recommendations.reason: Warm spicy vanilla perfume by Tom Ford

recommendations.name: Warm Vanilla Sugar
recommendations.reason: Vanilla sweet powdery warm spicy, perfect for a Tom Ford-like fragrance

recommendations.name: Goddess
recommendations.reason: Vanilla lavender warm spicy cacao, similar to Tom Ford's style

query: I want a fragrance with tobacco, vanilla, and woody warmth.

recommendations.name: Durra
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines tobacco, vanilla, and woody warmth with a unique blend of sea notes, aromatic spices, and sweet accords.

recommendations.name: Tabacco-Toscano
recommendations.reason: As the name suggests, this fragrance is all about tobacco, with vanilla and leather adding depth and warmth. The woody base notes provide a satisfying dry down.

recommendations.name: Primo Marocaine
recommendations.reason: This fragrance offers a rich blend of warm spicy, woody, and sweet accords, with tobacco and vanilla providing a comforting presence. The patchouli and cedar add a nice earthy depth.

query: Find me something combining rose, musk, and sandalwood.

recommendations.name: Rose
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines rose with musk and sandalwood in its base notes, making it a great match for your scent brief.

recommendations.name: Darling-Rouge
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features amber, rose, and musky accords, which align with your request. The sandalwood note in the base adds a nice woody depth to the scent.

recommendations.name: Rose-Goldea
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines rose with musk and sandalwood, making it a great match for your scent brief. The fresh and floral notes in the top and middle accords add a nice contrast to the rich base notes.

query: I want bergamot, lavender, and cedar in an aromatic style.

recommendations.name: Musk-Oxygen
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines bergamot with lavender and cedar in its top, middle, and base notes, respectively. The aromatic style suits your preferences.

recommendations.name: Acqua Di Colonia Lavanda
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features bergamot as a top note, along with lavender in its middle and base notes. The woody and fresh spicy accords also align with your preferences.

recommendations.name: Alfazema-Provencal
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has bergamot as a top note, lavender in its middle and base notes, and cedar in the base. The aromatic and fresh spicy accords also match your preferences.

query: Recommend a white floral with jasmine and tuberose.

recommendations.name: 3-fleurs
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features a prominent tuberose note and a blend of jasmine and white floral accords, making it an excellent match for your scent preferences.

recommendations.name: Almafolia
recommendations.reason: With its tuberose and jasmine notes, Almafolia is a great option that combines sweet and floral elements with a subtle amber base, which should appeal to your taste in white florals.

recommendations.name: Artissima
recommendations.reason: Artissima's blend of tuberose, jasmine, and citrus notes creates a fresh and floral scent that should satisfy your desire for a white floral fragrance with jasmine and tuberose.

query: I want something that feels like reading in an old library on a rainy evening.

recommendations.name: Valentino-Uomo Born in Roma
recommendations.reason: The woody and mineral notes in this fragrance evoke a sense of old books and dusty shelves, while the ozonic accord adds a touch of freshness reminiscent of a rainy evening.

recommendations.name: CK2
recommendations.reason: The combination of wasabi, violet leaf, and mandarin orange in this fragrance creates a sense of excitement and discovery, much like the thrill of finding a hidden gem in an old library.

recommendations.name: Daisy Skies
recommendations.reason: The aquatic and ozonic notes in this fragrance evoke the feeling of being surrounded by the sounds and smells of a rainy evening, while the floral notes add a touch of warmth and comfort.

query: I want a dark, mysterious scent that feels warm and intimate.

recommendations.name: Filth
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines dark and mysterious notes of leather, animalic, and amber with warm spicy and patchouli accords, making it a perfect match for your scent brief.

recommendations.name: Collapse Of Hedonism-Krakh-Gedonizma
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features smoky and woody notes with dark chocolate and leather accords, which aligns with your desire for a warm and intimate scent.

recommendations.name: Chocolate Wasted
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines sweet and cacao notes with amber and bourbon vanilla, creating a warm and inviting scent that matches your brief's requirements.

query: I want something like sunlight in a citrus herb garden after rain.

recommendations.name: Quasar-Graffiti
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines green and citrus notes with woody and spicy accords, evoking the feeling of sunlight in a citrus herb garden after rain.

recommendations.name: Pacha-Ibiza Psicodelic For Men
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features mandarin orange, piña colada, and green apple notes, which evoke the freshness of citrus herbs after rain. The woody base adds depth to the scent.

recommendations.name: Play It Pin-Up 2014
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines fruity and sweet notes with a hint of citrus, reminiscent of a sunny day in a garden after rain. The vanilla and musk base adds warmth to the scent.

query: I want a cozy bakery scent with coffee, cocoa, and soft sweetness.

recommendations.name: Cafe Ambre Noir
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines warm spicy and woody accords with a strong coffee presence, making it a great match for your cozy bakery scent preferences.

recommendations.name: Black Opium Sound Illusion
recommendations.reason: While not primarily a bakery scent, Black Opium Sound Illusion has a sweet and soft spicy accord that might complement the coffee and cocoa notes you're looking for.

recommendations.name: Black Opium Intense
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features a strong coffee presence, combined with aromatic and vanilla accords that could create a cozy bakery-like atmosphere.

query: I need a clean and understated fragrance for the office.

recommendations.name: h2eau-water-lotus
recommendations.reason: This fragrance is a great choice for the office as it's clean, understated and has a fresh aquatic accord that will keep you feeling energized throughout the day.

recommendations.name: snow-palace
recommendations.reason: Snow Palace is a crisp and refreshing scent that's perfect for the office. Its ozonic and marine notes will evoke feelings of calmness and serenity, making it an excellent choice for a professional setting.

recommendations.name: wild-orange
recommendations.reason: Wild Orange is a bright and uplifting scent that's sure to boost your mood. Its citrus and white floral notes are subtle yet effective, making it an excellent choice for everyday wear in the office.

query: I want a warm, elegant scent for a winter evening date.

recommendations.name: Dandy or Not G A
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines warm spicy and leather notes with citrus and white floral accords, making it a great fit for a winter evening date.

recommendations.name: The Library Collection Opus I
recommendations.reason: With its woody, warm spicy, and white floral accords, this fragrance is perfect for a sophisticated winter evening date. The cardamom and bitter orange top notes add a nice touch of elegance.

recommendations.name: Pacha Ibiza Psicodelic For Men
recommendations.reason: This fragrance's fruity, citrus, and fresh spicy accords will create a lively atmosphere for your winter evening date. The warm spicy base notes add depth and sophistication.

query: I want a relaxed scent for a weekend by the sea.

recommendations.name: Batucada
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines citrus and marine notes with a sweet and woody base, evoking the feeling of being by the sea.

recommendations.name: Collection Azur Viree en Mer
recommendations.reason: This scent features white floral and marine accords, with a citrus and aromatic top note that captures the essence of a sunny day by the ocean.

recommendations.name: Del-Mar
recommendations.reason: With its blend of white floral, citrus, and musky notes, Del-Mar is a relaxed and uplifting scent that's perfect for a weekend by the sea.

query: I want vanilla and woody notes, but nothing strongly fruity.

recommendations.name: Durra
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines woody and aromatic notes with a sweet and warm spicy accord, featuring vanilla as one of its base notes. It should suit your preferences for vanilla and woody notes without strong fruity notes.

recommendations.name: Raunaq
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a sweet and woody profile with warm spicy and fruity notes, featuring saffron and tobacco in its top notes. While it does have some fruity notes, they are not overpowering, making it a suitable choice for you.

recommendations.name: Jeans
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a sweet and woody profile with vanilla as one of its base notes. It features wild berries and mandarin orange in its top notes, but the overall scent is not strongly fruity. The woody and vanilla notes should appeal to your preferences.

query: I want a jasmine white floral fragrance without a rose note.

recommendations.name: 3-fleurs
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a prominent jasmine note and does not include rose as one of its accords.

recommendations.name: my-dynastie-princess
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features lily, white rose, and jasmine in its middle notes, making it a good fit for someone looking for a jasmine-based scent without rose.

recommendations.name: cassandra-rose-jasmin
recommendations.reason: Although this fragrance has 'rose' in its name, the description suggests that the rose note is not prominent, and the jasmine tea and jasmine notes are more dominant.

query: I want a citrus aromatic fragrance, but please avoid lavender.

recommendations.name: Phantom
recommendations.reason: This fragrance has a strong citrus accord and an aromatic dry down, making it a great match for your preferences.

recommendations.name: Libre
recommendations.reason: This fragrance features a prominent citrus note and a sweet vanilla base, which should appeal to your love of citrus aromas. The lavender note is present but not overpowering.

recommendations.name: Musk-Oxygen
recommendations.reason: Although this fragrance does contain lavender, it's not the dominant note. The citrus and aromatic accords should still appeal to your preferences, making it a decent compromise.

query: Something that smells like rain falling on cold stone.

recommendations.name: Gardenia Fresh Rain
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines white floral and aquatic notes with a hint of green, evoking the feeling of rain falling on cold stone.

recommendations.name: When The Rain Stops
recommendations.reason: The combination of green notes, bergamot, and pink pepper in this fragrance creates a fresh and aquatic scent that captures the essence of rain falling on cold stone.

recommendations.name: Dragonfly Edition 2021
recommendations.reason: The blend of grapefruit, angelica, and rain notes in this fragrance creates a unique and refreshing scent that is reminiscent of the smell of rain falling on cold stone.

query: A scent that feels like sunlight passing through a quiet forest.

recommendations.name: Berriessence
recommendations.reason: This fragrance combines fruity and sweet accords with woody notes, evoking the feeling of sunlight passing through a quiet forest.

recommendations.name: Eau-03-Positano-Sunrise
recommendations.reason: The combination of coconut, fruity, and sweet accords with woody and violet notes creates a sense of warmth and serenity, reminiscent of sunlight in a forest.

recommendations.name: Quasar-Graffiti
recommendations.reason: This fragrance's green and aromatic accords, combined with fresh spicy and woody notes, evoke the feeling of a sunny day in a forest, with the added depth of sandalwood and amber.
